title: What it actually looks like to need people (without losing yourself)
caption:
The man who needs no one isn't strong. He's just unaccountable.

A man without accountability is a man without a mirror — and men without mirrors drift in directions they can't see. It's almost never self-sufficiency keeping men alone. It's unconfessed sin, wounds they're still pretending aren't there, or pride that can't take correction without taking it as an attack.

Isolation doesn't protect you. It protects your worst self.

What you actually need is two or three men who know your name, know your sin, and pick up the phone. Not a podcast. Not a men's group where everyone says "I'm good." Real men with your number.

"As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another." — Proverbs 27:17.

You can't be sharpened by something that never touches you.

Share this with a man you've been keeping at arm's length.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
